chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-552 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) For hearing of main case 25.09.2025 Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG --------- This is an old petition of 2023. It was last taken up on 14.03.2023, which is nearly two and half years ago. In the last two and half years, learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to diligently pursue this petition. Today, despite the lapse of two and half years, learned counsel for the petitioner is called absent without any intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition which is accordingly dismissed for non- prosecution. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Nadir*
